name: VTOL Fixed-Wing UAV
description: The primary airframe for the custom UAV project — a hybrid VTOL fixed-wing design with quad lift rotors on twin booms for vertical take-off and efficient forward flight. Designed in SolidWorks, optimized for low weight and high structural rigidity, validated with CFD flow simulation and built as a flying prototype with a carbon-fiber airframe variant. Full design is classified.

renders.caption: Completed UAV prototype in the field
VTOL configuration — quad lift rotors and inverted V-tail
Lift rotor placement on twin booms
Carbon fiber airframe render

simulations.caption: CFD flow trajectory analysis over wing section — velocity field (SolidWorks Flow Simulation)
CFD pressure field with flow trajectories over the airframe (SolidWorks Flow Simulation)
CFD velocity flow trajectories over the carbon-fiber airframe (SolidWorks Flow Simulation)

name: Quadcopter UAV
description: Concept design for a quadcopter UAV — four-rotor configuration with camera gimbal mount, modeled and rendered in SolidWorks.

renders.caption: Quadcopter UAV concept render

name: Turbocharger Flow Simulation
description: CFD study of a turbocharger assembly using SolidWorks Flow Simulation. The animation traces flow trajectories through the compressor and turbine stages, visualizing velocity distribution across the rotating assembly.

renders.caption: Flow vector preview

simulations.caption: Turbocharger flow trajectory animation (SolidWorks Flow Simulation)

name: Automatic Solar Powered Boom Sprayer
description: A Pioneer Machine Design for Automatic Solar Boom Sprayer to increase Efficiency of Agricultural Farm Process sponsored by Technical Division of Institute of Agricultural Research (IAR), Ahmadu Bello University (ABU).

renders.caption: Full system assembly — solar panel, tank and boom nozzle array
Pump and tank configuration with folded boom
Rear view — boom nozzle array and battery placement
Engineering drawing — full assembly (extracted from PDF)

name: Sugarcane Grinding Machine
description: A Prototype Machine Design for Sugarcane Grinder made with stainless steel, Aluminum, and some other metals.

name: 3D Printed Servo Cover
description: A 3D Printed Servo Cover made up of PLA and was used as mould to make the carbon fiber prototype, Designed using SolidWorks.

renders.caption: Printed PLA servo covers — finished black parts
White PLA print batch — aerodynamic fin profile
Finished white prints — side profile

name: Tubular Car Frame Chassis
description: A lightweight tubular space-frame chassis for a small utility vehicle — designed in SolidWorks with chain-driven spoked wheels, then fabricated from square steel tubing in the workshop.

renders.caption: Space-frame chassis CAD render
CAD render — front quarter view
Side profile — frame geometry and wheel placement
Fabricated chassis — welded steel frame with wheels and chain drive

name: A-Frame Barrage Machine
description: A wheel-mounted A-frame barrage rig — twin-wheel carrier chassis with a pedal-crank chain drive and long boom rails. Designed in SolidWorks and fabricated from square steel tube; the photo series documents the full workshop fabrication.

renders.caption: CAD — A-frame boom rig with wheeled carrier
CAD — boom and carrier frame, side view
Fabricated rig — A-frame boom mounted on the carrier
Carrier chassis fabrication — wheels and mounting posts
Carrier chassis — top view during welding
Boom frames and wheel carriers in the workshop
Boom rails staged in the workshop
Welded boom rails with clamp fittings
Pedal-crank and chain drive assembly
Chain drive close-up — sprocket and wheel
Carrier chassis with twin chain drives

name: Spring Design Model
description: A Prototype Design of a Spring, Designed using SolidWorks.

name: Bench Vice
description: A machine vice assembly modeled in SolidWorks — fixed and movable jaws, lead screw and tommy-bar handle, rendered in stainless finish.

renders.caption: Bench vice assembly render

name: Electronics Enclosure with Exhaust Fan
description: A ventilated electronics enclosure design featuring an exhaust fan assembly for active cooling, with transparent housing visualization to show internal component layout.

renders.caption: Transparent enclosure render showing exhaust fan and internal cylinder
Exhaust fan assembly engineering drawing (extracted from PDF)

name: PCB Assembly — Exploded View
description: Exploded-view visualization of a multi-board PCB assembly, showing the stack-up of the carrier board, daughter board, connectors and shielded module.

renders.caption: Exploded view of the PCB assembly

name: Flat Head Screw
description: Detailed thread modeling exercise — a slotted flat head wood screw modeled with full helical thread geometry, accompanied by a dimensioned engineering drawing.

renders.caption: Slotted flat head screw render
Dimensioned engineering drawing (extracted from PDF)

name: Proposed MiFi Device — Concept
description: Industrial design concept for a slim portable MiFi (mobile Wi-Fi hotspot) device — glossy low-profile housing with embossed branding, modeled and rendered in SolidWorks.

renders.caption: MiFi concept render — top face with embossed logo

name: Automatic Pet Feeder
description: Product design for an automatic pet feeder — a wooden cabinet-style unit with an internal funnel chute that dispenses feed into the front tray on schedule, rendered with photorealistic wood materials.

renders.caption: Automatic pet feeder — front isometric render
